description: These light sneakers are perfect for a day out with friends or for  Friday dressing. The versatility of these sneakers ensures you can couple them with evening footwear and day wear. Get into them to feel the luxury of life.Upper Synthetic leather with stitched overlays for added structure and durability Central lacing for comfortable customized Fit Lightly padded tongue and collar for snug fit Suede patchwork near the midfoot area for complete support Stitch detailing over the toe box for added structure Synthetic patches with brand embroidery over the heel cup for shock absorption Outsole embedded onto the heel counter for anti slippage precaution Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all day step in comfort Cambreel lining the soft padded insole for excellent arch support Outsole Outsole in durable rubber with vertical flex grooves for excellent traction Hexagonal pattern outsole for better grip on any surface shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
